hero.question: Will Bitcoin dip to $45,000 by December 31, 2026?
hero.prob_take: Bitcoin bulls are rotating out of doomsday hedges as the $45K floor looks less likely with macro tailwinds, explaining the 10-point dive in capitulation bets. The 48.5% is actually generous for a 14% drawdown from current levels over 11 months, especially if we see a Fed pivot or corporate adoption wave.

daily_take.headline: Bitcoin's $45K Floor Crumbles. Smart Money Just Went All In.
daily_take.deck: Bitcoin dipped below $45K odds tanked 10 points in 24 hours, signaling panic in the prediction market even as spot price stayed flat. The market's overpricing downside risk here. A 48.5% probability for a $45K dip by EOY 2026 assumes volatility stays elevated and macro conditions worsen, but $1.5M in volume suggests retail fear is dominating. Sharp play: fade the dip. Long positions on "no" now offer 51.5% odds with macro tailwinds and institutional conviction already priced in.

sidebar.headline: Atlético Madrid at 31.5% and sinking is dead money. Sharper bettors know the Asian line disagrees hard.

sidebar.headline: Iran at 86% odds to close Strait of Hormuz is baking in worst-case. Geopolitical markets always overshoot fear.
